svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"22_near_left_far_right","label":"Near-left and far-right exits","topology":"Place two distinct junctions: a near left branch exits at L0, then a distant right branch exits at R2; keep the main route continuous to T0.","sockets":["B0","T0","L0","R2"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035},"L0":{"edge":"left","center":0.56,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.028},"R2":{"edge":"right","center":0.375,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.016}}}
